(2) डॉ. समीर कुमार िस瀈हा, वाइ瀖डलाइफ 灩瀡ट ऑफ इंिडया, एफ-13, से榉टर-8, नोएडा, उ牵र 灹देश-201301 सद瀡य ; (3) डॉ. अमर नाथ वमा榁, 10192 एटीएस एडवांटेज, अ琐हसा खंड-1, िनकट हैिबटेट से瀈टर, इि瀈灶रापुरम, गािजयाबाद, 201014 सद瀡य ; (11) डॉ. 琈दलीप कुमार पॉल, सहायक आचाय榁 और पा獓灙म सम瀈वय, एमएससी पया榁वरण िव榀ान और 灹बंध, 琁ातको牵र 灹ाणी िव榀ान िवभाग, पटना िव玓िव獸ालय, पटना, िबहार-800005 सद瀡य ; (12) सद瀡य सिचव, िबहार रा榖य 灹दूषण के瀈灶 बोड榁 सद瀡य सिचव।‘’। [फा. सं. जे-11013/36/2008-आईए-II(II)] 榀ानेश भारती, संयु猴 सिचव 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण :::: मूल अिधसूचना, भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) म犆, का.आ. सं. 1514(अ), तारीख 5 अ灹ैल, 2018 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी । -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th July, 2018 S.O. 3447(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986) and in pursuance of the Notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.O. 1533(E), dated the 14th September, 2006, the Central Government herebymakes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 1514(E), dated the 05th April, 2018, namely:- 2. In said notification, for paragraph number 5, the following paragraph shall be substituted, namely:- ‘’For the purposes of assisting the Authority, Bihar, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Bihar, hereby constitutes the State Level Expert Appraisal Committee, Bihar comprising of the following members, namely :- (1) Shri Murarijee Mishra, Vijay Nagar, Near Temple, Rukunpura, Patna - 800014 Chairman; (2) Dr. Samir Kumar Sinha, Wildlife Trust of India, F-13, Sector - 8, Noida, Uttar Pradesh - 201301 Member; (3) Dr. Amar Nath Verma, 10192 ATS Advantage, Ahinsha Khand - 1, Near Habitat Centre, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad - 201014 Member; (4) Dr. Shardendu, Department of Botany, Patna Science College Member; (5) Shri Vijay Kumar Sinha, IFS. (Retd.), Prasad Bhawan, R.K Path, Pirmohani, Kadamkuan, Patna- 800003 Member; (6) Dr. Birendra Prasad, Department of Botany, Patna University, Patna-800005 Member; -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] (7) Dr. Sudhanshu Kumar, C-4/1401, Puri Pranayama Sector 82 & 85, Faridabad-121007, Haryana Member; (8) Dr. Chandan Bhar, Professor, Department of Management Studies, Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad-826004, Jharkhand Member; (9) Dr. Ram Madhab Bhattacharjee, Professor, Department of Mining Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad - 826004, Jharkhand Member; (10) Dr. Rakesh Kumar Singh, G-600.12th Street, GAMA-II, Greater Noida (UP) - 201310 Member; (11) Dr. Dilip Kumar Paul, Assistant Professor & Course Coordinator, M.Sc. Environmental Science & Management, Post Graduate Department of Zoology, Patna University, Patna, Bihar-800005 Member; (12) Member Secretary, Bihar State Pollution Control Board Member Secretary.’’. [F.No. J-11013/36/2008-IA-II(II)] GYANESH BHARTI, Jt. Secy. Note:- The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O.1514 (E) dated the 05th April, 2018.
